name: HIAG Immobilien Holding AG
summary: HIAG Immobilien Holding AG, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the management and redevelopment of properties in Switzerland. Its property portfolio includes industrial and commercial, residential, retail, building land, distribution and logistics, office, and other properties. The company also offers metal recycling services. In addition, it is involved in the management, asset management, and technical administrative management of the pension funds, as well as provides human resources services to third parties. The company was founded in 1876 and is headquartered in Basel, Switzerland.
